Database Hosting Options

Trade-off Matrix · plan-html · 3 options × 5 criteria
Criterion
Supabase
Managed Postgres + Auth
PlanetScale
Serverless MySQL
Self-hosted Postgres
Fly.io / Render
Cost (free tier)
Generous
500MB DB + Auth + Storage included
Generous
1B row reads/mo free
Limited
Instance cost $7+/mo min
Operational burden
Minimal
Fully managed, auto-backups
Low
Serverless, no connection pooling needed
High
Manual backups, upgrades, pooling
Auth integration
Native
Built-in Auth + RLS = zero glue code
None
Must add separate auth layer
Manual
Full control, significant setup cost
SQL compatibility
Full Postgres
Extensions, RLS, full SQL standard
MySQL
No native JSON ops, no JSONB
Full Postgres
Full control over extensions
Scalability
Good
Read replicas on Pro plan
Excellent
Auto-sharding, horizontal scale
High
Scale vertically/horizontally, full control
